name: Grouse & Wild Rice
recipeIngredient: Garlic salt, oregano, and Basil to taste
recipeInstructions:
1) Combine the wild rice with 2 cups of chicken broth and 1/4 cup butter in a saucepan. Cover and cook until tender. Keep warm.
2) Rinse the grouse filets and pat them dry. Pound the filets between waxed paper using a meat mallet until tender, then combine with the beaten eggs in a bowl. Let stand for 1 hour.
3) In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, oregano, garlic salt, basil, and pepper to taste. Roll the filets in this mixture, coating them well.
4) Brown the filets on both sides in 2 tablespoons butter in a skillet. Add enough chicken broth to cover the bottom of the pan, then simmer the filets, covered, for 10 minutes.
5) Place a slice of cheese on each filet and cook until the cheese is melted. Serve with the cooked wild rice.
